meta.commercialUsage: Product Hunt API must not be used for commercial purposes without Product Hunt approval.

issues.title: 产品灵感日报 · 20 个新品

products.name: Tencent EdgeOne Makers
products.tagline: Ship AI agents like web apps, in minutes.
products.summaryZh: 像部署网页应用一样，几分钟内即可部署AI智能体。
products.descriptionZh: 腾讯EdgeOne Makers是一个面向现代Web应用和AI智能体的边缘平台。使用你偏好的框架进行构建，并通过熟悉的CLI、Git和CI/CD工作流进行部署。内置智能体运行时、沙箱化工具、记忆、可观测性、模型网关支持、无服务器函数和存储——无需拼凑复杂的基础设施。为现有产品添加AI智能体，或在数分钟内启动新的AI应用。像部署Web应用一样部署AI智能体。
products.description: Tencent EdgeOne Makers is an edge platform for modern web apps and AI agents. Build with your preferred frameworks and deploy through familiar CLI, Git, and CI/CD workflows. Get built-in agent runtime, sandboxed tools, memory, observability, model gateway support, serverless functions, and storage—without stitching together complex infrastructure. Add AI agents to existing products or launch new AI applications in minutes. Deploy AI agents like web apps.

products.name: Propane
products.tagline: Automatic customer context for product teams and agents
products.summaryZh: 面向产品团队与智能体的自动客户上下文
products.descriptionZh: Propane 为您的产品团队和客服人员提供统一、实时更新的客户视图。自动从所有工具中收集信息。在共享画布上协作。直接提交至任意编码或设计代理。安全、可维护、始终在线。您只需打造用户喜爱的产品。
products.description: Propane gives your product team and agents one connected, always-current view of your customers. Automatically collected from all your tools. Collaborate on a shared canvas. Commit straight to any coding or design agent. Secure, maintained, always on. You just build products people love.

products.name: Crewdle AI
products.tagline: Use every business AI tool without every subscription
products.summaryZh: 无需逐一订阅，即可使用所有商业AI工具
products.descriptionZh: Crewdle让小型企业无需维持十几个订阅即可获得所需的人工智能工具。通过一个平台使用聊天、智能体、自动化、内容、网站和商业工具，采用按用量计费的方式，无需为几乎不用的产品每月付费。它专为希望借助AI运营企业、同时避免订阅泛滥、技术部署和复杂企业架构的经营者打造。
products.description: Crewdle gives small businesses access to the AI tools they need without keeping a dozen subscriptions alive. Use chat, agents, automation, content, websites, and business tools from one platform, with usage-based billing instead of paying every month for products you barely touch. It is built for owners who want AI to help run the business without subscription sprawl, technical setup, or enterprise complexity.

products.name: Stripe.Directory
products.tagline: New way for you & agents to search for businesses on Stripe
products.summaryZh: 为您与代理商提供在Stripe上搜索企业的新方式
products.descriptionZh: Stripe Directory 是一个统一的发现层，供开发者和 AI 代理查找 Stripe 上的商家——包括 Stripe Apps、Projects.dev 提供商和 mpp.dev 服务——并与之集成，无需手动搜索。
products.description: Stripe Directory is a single discovery layer for developers and AI agents to find businesses on Stripe—including Stripe Apps, Projects.dev providers, and mpp.dev services—and integrate them without the need to manually search for them.

products.name: Customer Relationship Agents by Clarify
products.tagline: The M in CRM shouldn't be you
products.summaryZh: CRM中的M不应是你。
products.descriptionZh: 处理您手动完成的CRM工作——管道摘要、线索丰富、数据清洗、通话辅导等——的智能体。它们按计划或信号运行，跨技术栈工作，无需您干预即可自动触发。可设置为完全自主运行，或在执行前需经您批准。描述您想自动化的内容，或从模板开始，Clarify将据此构建。
products.description: Agents that handle the CRM work you've been doing manually — pipeline digests, lead enrichment, data hygiene, call coaching, and much more. They run on a schedule or a signal, work across your stack, and fire without you touching them. Set them to run fully autonomously or require your approval before acting. Describe what you want to automate or start from a template. Clarify builds it from there.

products.name: Mindstone Rebel
products.tagline: AI workspace for agents that know your work and ask first
products.summaryZh: 面向智能体的AI工作空间，了解你的工作并主动询问
products.descriptionZh: Rebel 是一款面向智能体工作的桌面端 AI 工作空间。它整合了你的记忆、会议、文件、操作、自动化流程及工具，使 AI 智能体能够协助处理实际工作——同时将敏感操作置于审批检查之后。采用公平源代码构建，支持可移植工作流与模型选择。
products.description: Rebel is a desktop AI workspace for agentic work. It connects your memory, meetings, files, actions, automations, and tools so AI agents can help with real work — while keeping sensitive actions behind approval checks. Built Fair Source, with portable workflows and model choice.

products.name: Buy by Agentcard
products.tagline: Order DoorDash from Claude
products.summaryZh: 通过Claude下单DoorDash
products.descriptionZh: 现在你可以通过Claude购买Doordash。将Agentcard连接到你的Openclaw、Claude或任何你使用的工具，告诉我们你的需求，剩下的交给我们。这感觉就像魔法。从agentcard.sh安装，免费下你的第一单！
products.description: you can now buy Doordash from Claude. connect Agentcard to your Openclaw, Claude or whatever you use, ask for what you want and we handle the rest. it feels magic. install from agentcard.sh and make your first order for free!

products.name: StaleMate PR
products.tagline: Your menu bar turns red when PRs pile up
products.summaryZh: 当PR堆积时，你的菜单栏会变红。
products.descriptionZh: StaleMate 是一款小巧的 macOS 菜单栏应用，用于监控你的 GitHub 和 GitLab 拉取请求。当队列清空时图标保持绿色，审核积压时变为淡黄色，情况开始恶化时则转为红色。支持最多 5 个独立监控。原生、沙盒化、价格友好。
products.description: StaleMate is a tiny macOS menu-bar app that watches your GitHub & GitLab pull requests. The icon stays green when the queue is clean, fades yellow when reviews build up, and goes red when things start to rot. Up to 5 independent monitors. Native, sandboxed, $-friendly.

products.name: Ruby
products.tagline: Ask better questions, live on every call
products.summaryZh: 提出更好的问题，在每一次通话中活学活用
products.descriptionZh:
大多数人打完一通重要电话后，总会想“我本该问那个问题的”。Ruby确保你不会这样。她实时倾听，在对话进行时，通过只有你能看到的小药丸，把值得问的问题推给你。  
→ 通话前：她帮你理清目标，明确该留意什么。  
→ 通话中：她在恰当时机提示你提出更精准的问题。  
→ 通话后：她自动生成总结，省去你的整理工作。
products.description: Most people walk out of an important call thinking "I should have asked that." Ruby makes sure you don't. She listens in real time and slides you the question worth asking — through a small pill only you can see, live as the conversation unfolds. → Before: she helps you think through your goal and what to listen for. → During: she nudges you with the sharper question, at exactly the right moment. → After: she writes the recap, so you don't have to.

products.name: React UI Kit V7
products.tagline: All the chat components you need. None of the complexity
products.summaryZh: 你需要的所有聊天组件，无需复杂配置。
products.descriptionZh: 使用 CometChat React UI Kit V7，在 React 中更快地构建聊天、语音和视频体验。开箱即用，获得生产级消息组件、通话功能、AI 特性、主题定制、本地化及自定义能力。V7 新增：更灵活的组件架构、基于插件的可扩展性、改进的自定义能力，以及对 React、Next.js、React Router 和 Astro 的支持。轻松交付功能完备的聊天体验。
products.description: Build chat, voice, and video experiences in React faster with CometChat React UI Kit V7. Get production-ready messaging components, calling, AI features, theming, localization, and customization out of the box. New in V7: a more flexible component architecture, plugin-based extensibility, improved customization, and support for React, Next.js, React Router, and Astro. Ship a fully featured chat experience effortlessy.

products.name: Nimt
products.tagline: Your AI Search Coworker in Slack
products.summaryZh: 你在Slack中的AI搜索助手
products.descriptionZh: Nimt 驻留在 Slack 中，为你端到端处理 AI 搜索。它不是工具，也不是仪表盘。Nimt 是你的 AI 搜索同事。它会在所有主流 AI 模型上设置追踪，构建你的仪表盘，并完成工作，助你在页面内和页面外胜出。Nimt 甚至能在你的 CMS、收件箱、社交媒体以及其他 3000 多个平台中运行。
products.description: Nimt lives in Slack and handles AI search for you, end to end. It's not a tool, not a dashboard. Nimt is your AI search coworker. It sets up tracking across every major AI model, builds your dashboard, and does the work to make you win, on-page and off-page. Nimt even works in your CMS, your inbox, social media, and 3,000 other.

products.name: Swimio
products.tagline: AI swim coach with Apple Watch tracking & smart workouts
products.summaryZh: AI游泳教练，支持Apple Watch追踪与智能训练
products.descriptionZh: Swimio 将AI教练、高级Apple Watch游泳追踪与个性化训练生成整合于一个专为游泳者打造的平台。根据你的目标定制训练计划，直接在Apple Watch上跟随执行，追踪配速、SWOLF、划水效率与心率，并在每次训练后获得可执行的性能洞察。专为不满足于简单计圈功能的游泳者、教练及团队设计。
products.description: Swimio combines AI coaching, advanced Apple Watch swim tracking, and personalized workout generation in one platform built specifically for swimmers. Create workouts tailored to your goals, follow them directly from your Apple Watch, track pace, SWOLF, stroke efficiency and heart rate, and get actionable performance insights after every session. Built for swimmers, coaches and teams who want more than a simple lap counter.

products.name: Prospector by Synter
products.tagline: Your outbound agent, right inside Slack
products.summaryZh: 你的外呼代理，就在Slack里。
products.descriptionZh: 没人喜欢仪表盘。所以我们做了 Prospector——一个驻留在 Slack 里的外呼代理。只需问一句：我的营销活动表现如何？谁参与了这条帖子、值得联系？它能读取你的外呼内容，从真实互动中构建列表，并用一句话回答。Prospector 负责外呼，Synter 负责付费媒体，它们共享同一批受众。试试看：/prospector /pipeline /campaigns /contacts /report
products.description: Nobody likes dashboards. So we built Prospector instead — an outbound agent that lives in Slack. Just ask: How are my campaigns doing? Who engaged with this post and is worth reaching out to? It reads your outbound, builds lists from real engagement, and answers in a sentence. Prospector runs outbound, Synter runs paid media, and they share the same audiences. Try it: /prospector /pipeline /campaigns /contacts /report

products.name: TaskFord
products.tagline: Plan, track, and align work across every project
products.summaryZh: 规划、跟踪并协调每个项目的工作。
products.descriptionZh: TaskFord 是集成项目、任务、协作、资源和时间线于一体的综合工作交付平台。团队不再受困于"工具泛滥"，也不会因应用割裂而丢失关键数据。TaskFord 通过将整个运营生命周期——从高层路线图到日常执行——集中管理，消除了这一摩擦。
products.description: TaskFord is the Integrated Work Delivery Platform that integrates projects, tasks, collaboration, resources, and timelines into one workspace. Teams will no longer suffer from "tool sprawl" or lose critical data between disconnected apps. TaskFord eliminates this friction by centralizing your entire operational lifecycle - from high-level roadmaps to daily execution.

products.name: Well - Business Context Graph
products.tagline: One Legible Business Context Graph for You and Your Agents
products.summaryZh: 一个清晰可读的业务上下文图，供你和你的智能体使用
products.descriptionZh: 如果您的整个业务都运行在一个MCP上会怎样？识别并同步您的SaaS、CRM、邮件、生产力工具、会计系统和银行账户，将它们整合到一个Shell中。通过一行命令管理所有MCP，将数据整合到一个上下文图谱中。让您的业务对您和您的智能体都清晰可读。
products.description: What if your whole business ran on one MCP? Well identify and sync with your SaaS, CRM, Emails, Productivity tools, Accounting and Banks get all that into one shell. Manage all your MCPs in one line of command, get your data consolidated into one context graph. Make your business legible, to you and your agents.

products.name: Premast ai
products.tagline: Your AI teammate for building presentations in PowerPoint
products.summaryZh: 在PowerPoint中制作演示文稿的AI助手
products.descriptionZh: 从单一提示到完整演示。Premast AI帮助创始人、营销人员、顾问和团队在几分钟内创建、优化和设计PowerPoint演示文稿。Premast AI助你更快地构思、撰写、设计和打磨PowerPoint演示文稿。适用于路演、销售方案、提案和团队演示。无需切换工具即可生成幻灯片、重写内容、构建演示结构并创建精美演示文稿。一切都在PowerPoint内完成。
products.description: From a single prompt to a complete presentation. Premast AI helps founders, marketers, consultants, and teams create, improve, & design PowerPoint presentations in minutes. Premast AI helps you brainstorm, write, design, and polish PowerPoint presentations faster. Perfect for pitches, sales decks, proposals, and team presentations. Generate slides, rewrite content, build presentation structures, and create beautiful decks without switching tools. Everything happens right inside PowerPoint.

products.name: Crop.photo AI for Shopify
products.tagline: Bulk Edit Shopify Product Photos With AI Recipes
products.summaryZh: 使用AI配方批量编辑Shopify产品图片
products.descriptionZh: 运营Shopify店铺意味着被图片处理淹没——每件商品都需要裁剪、调整尺寸、清理背景，还要适配产品详情页、广告和社交媒体的不同比例。Crop.photo能自动完成这一切。通过可复用的AI配方，批量编辑数千个SKU，自动完成裁剪、缩放、去背景和图像对齐。姿态感知AI甚至能区分模特与商品，实现干净统一的裁剪——然后从单张照片生成模特上身图、生活场景图和产品详情页视频。无需拍摄，无需Photoshop。
products.description: Running a Shopify store means drowning in image work- every product needs crops, resizes, clean backgrounds, and the right ratios for PDPs, ads, and social. Crop.photo automates all of it. Bulk-edit thousands of SKUs at once with reusable AI recipes that auto-crop, resize, remove backgrounds, and align images. Pose-aware AI even tells models from products for clean, consistent crops - then generates on-model shots, lifestyle scenes, and PDP videos from a single photo. No shoots. No Photoshop.

products.name: Liner Developer Platform
products.tagline: Build search agents with 10x cheaper web search
products.summaryZh: 用10倍更低成本的网络搜索构建搜索代理
products.descriptionZh: Liner 帮助开发者通过搜索代理和更低成本的搜索工具构建 AI 应用。为你的产品添加网页搜索、学术搜索、带引用的答案、深度研究和可视化答案。网页搜索起价为每 1000 次请求 1 美元——仅为 OpenAI 公开网页搜索工具调用价格的十分之一。
products.description: Liner helps developers build AI apps with search agents and lower-cost search tools. Add web search, academic search, cited answers, deep research, and visual answers to your product. Web Search starts at $1 / 1K requests — 1/10 of OpenAI’s public web search tool-call price.

products.name: FUTO Swipe
products.tagline: Open models for on-device swipe typing
products.summaryZh: 面向设备端滑动输入的开源模型
products.descriptionZh: FUTO Swipe是一系列用于精准滑动输入的小型开放模型。它包含一个与布局无关的编码器、一个与布局相关的解码器，以及一个轻量级上下文语言模型。整个系统在设备端高效运行，占用空间极小。FUTO还发布了用于训练该模型的100万条滑动输入数据集。
products.description: FUTO Swipe is a family of small, open models for accurate swipe typing. It includes a layout-agnostic encoder, a layout-specific decoder, and a lightweight context language model. The full system runs efficiently on-device with a very small footprint, and FUTO has also released the 1 million swipe dataset used to train it.

products.name: Off Autopilot
products.tagline: Curated, human-written articles about agentic coding
products.summaryZh: 精选的人工撰写的关于智能体编程的文章
products.descriptionZh: Agentic coding 领域的讨论正被大量赞助内容和低质信息淹没。Off Autopilot 是一份每周通讯，精选关于 agentic coding 的高质量、真人撰写的文章。
products.description: Agentic coding discourse is drowning in sponsored and slop content. Off Autopilot is a weekly newsletter curating high-signal, human-written articles about agentic coding
